zones.label: Battery zone
zones.description: Low-profile central traction-energy volume, seated on the cradle and capped below the sealed deck. Includes lateral clamp allowance.

zones.label: Compute zone
zones.description: Rear-left electronics bay: Jetson AGX Orin and storage. Airflow and vibration isolation required.

zones.label: Power conversion zone
zones.description: Raised front power bay above the chassis structure: distribution/fuse module and stacked DC-DC converters on isolated trays. Finger-safe covers and separation from signal harnesses required.

zones.label: Drive & aux electronics zone
zones.description: Rear drive-electronics bay: dual-channel motor controllers with heat spreaders, router-modem stack.

zones.label: Sensor zone
zones.description: Top deck and mast: LiDAR, integrated PTZ pedestal, one installed antenna and front sensor fascia. Coverage drawing and FOV occlusion study pending (spec 9.1).
